summary.en: Rwanda imports of lithium batteries and power banks are controlled through Rwanda Standards Board (RSB) processes rather than one dedicated battery statute. In-scope products usually require Product Verification of Conformity (PVoC), a Certificate of Conformity, and import inspection. For selected regulated items, S-Mark conditions can also apply. The country uses RS standards with IEC-derived references, and electrical context is 230 V / 50 Hz.
summary.zh: 卢旺达对锂电池/移动电源进口采用卢旺达标准局（RSB）的导入流程，而非单一电池法。适用范围内通常要求PVoC、合格证书和进口检验，部分受控产品还可能涉及S-Mark。卢旺达采用RS标准并参考IEC，电网参数为230V、50Hz。
summary.zht: 盧旺達對鋰電池/行動電源進口採用盧旺達標準局（RSB）的進口流程，而非單一電池法。適用範圍內通常要求PVoC、合格證書及進口檢驗，部分受控產品還可能涉及S-Mark。盧旺達採用RS標準並參考IEC，電網參數為230V、50Hz。

standards_or_laws: Rwandan Standards Board (RSB) import-product verification procedures
RSB Certificate of Conformity process for regulated electrical goods
RS import inspection framework for selected categories
RSB S-Mark conditions (where listed by product category)

summary.en: China uses GB/GB-T baselines for battery product safety, with CCC requirements in applicable domestic categories. These are domestic regimes and do not match the Rwanda-specific importer-led PVoC and CoC release model in structure.
summary.zh: 中国以GB/GB-T体系及部分品类CCC要求作为国内出口和销售基础，这属于国内管理体系，结构上不等同于卢旺达的进口商主导PVoC和合格证书放行模型。
summary.zht: 中國以GB/GB-T體系及部分品類CCC要求作為國內出口和銷售基礎，這屬於國內管理體系，結構上不等同於盧旺達的進口商主導PVoC和合格證書放行模型。

standards_or_laws: GB 31241-2022 — Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries
GB/T portable battery and charger-related safety references
China Compulsory Certification (CCC) catalogue where applicable

gap.en: Rwanda creates a destination-level compliance layer through PVoC, CoC, and import inspection. Rwanda does not run EU-style horizontal regimes in this lane, so requirements such as RoHS and EU-style battery passport/outdoor-noise sets are not the mapping target.
gap.zh: 卢旺达对入境产品有PVoC、合格证书和进口检验的目的地级别合规层，不能由中国国内文件直接替代。该市场场景下不存在EU式横向制度映射，如RoHS、电池护照或户外噪音类通用要求。
gap.zht: 盧旺達對入境產品有PVoC、合格證書和進口檢驗的目的地級別合規層，不能由中國國內文件直接替代。該市場場景下不存在EU式橫向制度映射，如RoHS、電池護照或戶外噪音類通用要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for in-scope regulated imports, with PVoC, Certificate of Conformity, and import inspection generally required before market entry.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for Chinese domestic process in applicable domestic categories, but the specific Rwanda PVoC/CoC importer-led model is not equivalent.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] The key Rwanda target-side requirement is document-led regulatory entry through the importer, not replacement of Chinese domestic certification alone. CN GB/GB-T remains useful as technical baseline only.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 卢旺达端核心在于由当地进口商主导的文件化入境控制，并不以替代中国国内认证为前提。中国GB/GB-T可作为技术基线使用，但不足以覆盖目的地放行。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 盧旺達端核心在於由當地進口商主導的文件化入境控制，並不以替代中國國內認證為前提。中國GB/GB-T可作為技術基線使用，但不足以覆蓋目的地放行。
